chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 23 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For hearing of main case 2. For hearing of MA No.160/2023 (Stay) 04.03.2024 Mr. Hamayoun Sheikh, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Shafi Muhammad Mahar, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Heard learned Counsel for the parties. Impugned order shows that learned Justice of Peace has not referred to the facts, which in his view, were sufficient to make out a case of cognizable nature. Hence, the order dated 06.01.2023 is set aside. Case is remanded back to the same Court for a decision afresh after hearing both the parties and referring to the relevant facts. Criminal Miscellaneous Application is accordingly disposed of along with listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
